deviations.description: The process model allows for process termination both when the donor does not consent and when the donor retracts consent, as shown in the process diagram on page 1. Version 2 of the requirement only obligates termination when the donor does not consent, removing the obligation to terminate upon retraction of consent. The process continues to enforce the stricter, outdated constraint from Version 1, resulting in over-compliance.
process_model_reference: process termination after donor retracts consent
